event.title: Meeting of the Berlin group in Berlin in Berlin, Germany

body.p: The Berlin group of FSFE usually meets every 2nd Thursday of the month at Kieztreff Undine. In May we do our meeting on the 4th Thursday because of the public holiday. You can find the Undine at Hagenstraße 57, a 5-minute walk from the Lichtenberg underground station, the meeting will be from 6 to 8 pm.
All those interested in Free Software are welcome to come to the meeting. Accessible access to the Kieztreff is possible via the courtyard.
